description: Configure Screaming Frog SEO Spider to classify internal links for https://books.toscrape.com/ using the Custom Link Positions feature. Define the following XPath positions: 'Header' (//header), 'Footer' (//footer), 'Sidebar' (//div[contains(@class, "side_categories")]), and 'Main_Content' (//div[contains(@class, "col-sm-8")]). Export the 'All Inlinks' data to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/inlinks_by_position.csv and create a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/link_distribution_report.txt listing the count of links found for each custom position.
